openFindings.title: Skill-scope path literals still have multiple source-code representations
README topology omits the scope policy module that now owns the include-skills contract
Readiness stale reason leaks internal manifest vocabulary
Default-scope scan test inherits maintainer env opt-in and fails under documented shell state
code-graph-indexer regression tests do not cover the full six-case scope precedence matrix
REGRESSION: R4-P2-001 scan data.errors still expose absolute indexed file paths
REGRESSION: R1-P2-001/R2-P2-001/R4-P2-002 resource-map §2 no longer matches the required main~1..HEAD in-scope diff
ADR-001 still has five sub-decisions; precedence is only recorded in ADR-002
Remediation summary names six fixes but does not provide file:line evidence
code_graph_status cannot evaluate the per-call scan scope and reports env-only active scope after one-off overrides
